See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
limitations under the License.
*/

package v1alpha1

import (
        "os"
        "path/filepath"

        . "github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2"
        . "github.com/onsi/gomega"
        "github.com/spf13/afero"

        "sigs.k8s.io/kubebuilder/v4/pkg/config"
        cfgv3 "sigs.k8s.io/kubebuilder/v4/pkg/config/v3"
        "sigs.k8s.io/kubebuilder/v4/pkg/machinery"
        "sigs.k8s.io/kubebuilder/v4/pkg/model/resource"
        goPlugin "sigs.k8s.io/kubebuilder/v4/pkg/plugins/golang"
)

var _ = Describe("createAPISubcommand", func() {
        var (
                subCmd *createAPISubcommand
                cfg    config.Config
                res    *resource.Resource
                fs     machinery.Filesystem
        )

        BeforeEach(func() {
                subCmd = &createAPISubcommand{}
                cfg = cfgv3.New()
                _ = cfg.SetRepository("github.com/example/test")

                subCmd.options = &goPlugin.Options{}
                res = &resource.Resource{
                        GVK: resource.GVK{
                                Group:   "example.com",
                                Domain:  "test.io",
                                Version: "v1alpha1",
                                Kind:    "Memcached",
                        },
                        Plural:   "memcacheds",
                        API:      &resource.API{},
                        Webhooks: &resource.Webhooks{},
                }

                fs = machinery.Filesystem{FS: afero.NewMemMapFs()}
                Expect(subCmd.InjectConfig(cfg)).To(Succeed())
        })

        Context("PreScaffold validation", func() {
                It("should require image flag to be set", func() {
                        subCmd.image = ""

                        err := subCmd.PreScaffold(fs)

                        Expect(err).To(HaveOccurred())
                        Expect(err.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("you MUST inform the image"))
                })

                It("should succeed when image is provided", func() {
                        subCmd.image = "memcached:1.6.15-alpine"

                        tmpDir, err := os.MkdirTemp("", "deploy-image-test")
                        Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
                        defer func() { _ = os.RemoveAll(tmpDir) }()

                        originalDir, err := os.Getwd()
                        Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
                        defer func() { _ = os.Chdir(originalDir) }()

                        err = os.Chdir(tmpDir)
                        Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())

                        err = os.MkdirAll("cmd", 0o755)
                        Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
                        err = os.WriteFile(filepath.Join("cmd", "main.go"), []byte("package main"), 0o644)
                        Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())

                        err = subCmd.PreScaffold(fs)

                        Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
                })

                It("should check for cmd/main.go in go/v4 projects", func() {
                        subCmd.image = "busybox:1.36.1"
                        _ = cfg.SetPluginChain([]string{"go.kubebuilder.io/v4"})

                        tmpDir, err := os.MkdirTemp("", "deploy-image-test")
                        Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
                        defer func() { _ = os.RemoveAll(tmpDir) }()

                        originalDir, err := os.Getwd()
                        Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
                        defer func() { _ = os.Chdir(originalDir) }()

                        err = os.Chdir(tmpDir)
                        Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())

                        err = subCmd.PreScaffold(fs)

                        Expect(err).To(HaveOccurred())
                        Expect(err.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("main.go file should be present in cmd/main.go"))
                })

                It("should check for main.go in go/v3 projects", func() {
                        subCmd.image = "busybox:1.36.1"
                        _ = cfg.SetPluginChain([]string{"go.kubebuilder.io/v3"})

                        tmpDir, err := os.MkdirTemp("", "deploy-image-test")
                        Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
                        defer func() { _ = os.RemoveAll(tmpDir) }()

                        originalDir, err := os.Getwd()
                        Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
                        defer func() { _ = os.Chdir(originalDir) }()

                        err = os.Chdir(tmpDir)
                        Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())

                        err = subCmd.PreScaffold(fs)

                        Expect(err).To(HaveOccurred())
                        Expect(err.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("main.go file should be present in main.go"))
                })
        })

        Context("InjectResource validation", func() {
                It("should set API and controller flags automatically", func() {
                        err := subCmd.InjectResource(res)

                        Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
                        Expect(subCmd.options.DoAPI).To(BeTrue())
                        Expect(subCmd.options.DoController).To(BeTrue())
                        Expect(subCmd.options.Namespaced).To(BeTrue())
                })

                It("should prevent multiple groups in single-group project", func() {
                        firstRes := resource.Resource{
                                GVK: resource.GVK{
                                        Group:   "ship",
                                        Domain:  "test.io",
                                        Version: "v1",
                                        Kind:    "Frigate",
                                },
                                Plural: "frigates",
                                API:    &resource.API{CRDVersion: "v1"},
                        }
                        Expect(cfg.AddResource(firstRes)).To(Succeed())

                        res.Group = "example.com"
                        res.Plural = "memcacheds"

                        err := subCmd.InjectResource(res)

                        Expect(err).To(HaveOccurred())
                        Expect(err.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("multiple groups are not allowed"))
                })

                It("should allow multiple groups when multigroup is enabled", func() {
                        Expect(cfg.SetMultiGroup()).To(Succeed())

                        firstRes := resource.Resource{
                                GVK: resource.GVK{
                                        Group:   "ship",
                                        Domain:  "test.io",
                                        Version: "v1",
                                        Kind:    "Frigate",
                                },
                                Plural: "frigates",
                                API:    &resource.API{CRDVersion: "v1"},
                        }
                        Expect(cfg.AddResource(firstRes)).To(Succeed())

                        res.Group = "example.com"

                        Expect(subCmd.InjectResource(res)).To(Succeed())
                })
        })
})

action.command:
cat > /tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro.sh <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
repo=/workspace/kubebuilder
tmp=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT
cd "$tmp" || exit 1
fail=0
current_year=$(date +%Y)

go run "$repo" init --plugins go/v4 --project-version 3 --domain example.com --repo example.com/year-demo >/tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro-init.log 2>&1 || {
  cat /tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro-init.log
  exit 1
}

if grep -q 'Copyright YEAR The Kubernetes authors\.' hack/boilerplate.go.txt; then
  echo 'ok: init boilerplate uses YEAR placeholder'
else
  echo 'FAIL: init boilerplate does not use YEAR placeholder'
  sed -n '1,8p' hack/boilerplate.go.txt
  fail=1
fi

python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('hack/boilerplate.go.txt')
s = p.read_text()
s = s.replace('Copyright 2026 The Kubernetes authors.', 'Copyright YEAR The Kubernetes authors.')
s = s.replace('Copyright 2025 The Kubernetes authors.', 'Copyright YEAR The Kubernetes authors.')
s = s.replace('Copyright 2024 The Kubernetes authors.', 'Copyright YEAR The Kubernetes authors.')
s = s.replace('Copyright 2023 The Kubernetes authors.', 'Copyright YEAR The Kubernetes authors.')
s = s.replace('Copyright 2022 The Kubernetes authors.', 'Copyright YEAR The Kubernetes authors.')
p.write_text(s)
PY

go run "$repo" create api --group ship --version v1 --kind Frigate --resource --controller --make=false >/tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro-api.log 2>&1 || {
  cat /tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro-api.log
  exit 1
}

if grep -q "Copyright ${current_year} The Kubernetes authors\." api/v1/frigate_types.go; then
  echo 'ok: create api resolved YEAR placeholder in Go header'
else
  echo 'FAIL: create api did not resolve YEAR placeholder in Go header'
  sed -n '1,8p' api/v1/frigate_types.go
  fail=1
fi

if grep -Fq 'YEAR ?= $(shell date +%Y)' Makefile && \
   grep -Fq 'object:headerFile="hack/boilerplate.go.txt",year=$(YEAR) paths="./..."' Makefile; then
  echo 'ok: Makefile passes year to controller-gen'
else
  echo 'FAIL: Makefile does not pass year to controller-gen as expected'
  grep -nE 'YEAR|controller-gen|headerFile|generate:' Makefile | head -20
  fail=1
fi

exit "$fail"
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro.sh
/tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro.sh

content.text:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
kb=/tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro-bin
tmp=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT
cd "$tmp" || exit 1
fail=0
current_year=$(date +%Y)

"$kb" init --plugins go/v4 --project-version 3 --domain example.com --repo example.com/year-demo --project-name year-demo >/tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro-init.log 2>&1 || {
  cat /tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro-init.log
  exit 1
}

if grep -q 'Copyright YEAR The Kubernetes authors\.' hack/boilerplate.go.txt; then
  echo 'ok: init boilerplate uses YEAR placeholder'
else
  echo 'FAIL: init boilerplate does not use YEAR placeholder'
  sed -n '1,8p' hack/boilerplate.go.txt
  fail=1
fi

python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('hack/boilerplate.go.txt')
s = p.read_text()
s = s.replace('Copyright 2026 The Kubernetes authors.', 'Copyright YEAR The Kubernetes authors.')
s = s.replace('Copyright 2025 The Kubernetes authors.', 'Copyright YEAR The Kubernetes authors.')
s = s.replace('Copyright 2024 The Kubernetes authors.', 'Copyright YEAR The Kubernetes authors.')
s = s.replace('Copyright 2023 The Kubernetes authors.', 'Copyright YEAR The Kubernetes authors.')
s = s.replace('Copyright 2022 The Kubernetes authors.', 'Copyright YEAR The Kubernetes authors.')
p.write_text(s)
PY

"$kb" create api --group ship --version v1 --kind Frigate --resource --controller --make=false >/tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro-api.log 2>&1 || {
  cat /tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro-api.log
  exit 1
}

if grep -q "Copyright ${current_year} The Kubernetes authors\." api/v1/frigate_types.go; then
  echo 'ok: create api resolved YEAR placeholder in Go header'
else
  echo 'FAIL: create api did not resolve YEAR placeholder in Go header'
  sed -n '1,8p' api/v1/frigate_types.go
  fail=1
fi

if grep -Fq 'YEAR ?= $(shell date +%Y)' Makefile && \
   grep -Fq 'object:headerFile="hack/boilerplate.go.txt",year=$(YEAR) paths="./..."' Makefile; then
  echo 'ok: Makefile passes year to controller-gen'
else
  echo 'FAIL: Makefile does not pass year to controller-gen as expected'
  grep -nE 'YEAR|controller-gen|headerFile|generate:' Makefile | head -20
  fail=1
fi

exit "$fail"

thought.text: Phase 5: the root problem is in source scaffolding, not generated samples. `hack.Boilerplate.SetTemplateDefaults` resolves the year too early; v4 `init`, `create api`, `create webhook`, and deploy-image scaffolding pass boilerplate file contents through unchanged; and the generated `Makefile` does not define or pass `YEAR` to `controller-gen`. The fix is to scaffold `YEAR`, replace that placeholder only when injecting boilerplate into generated Go files, and update the Makefile template to pass `year=$(YEAR)`.

action.command:
cd /workspace/kubebuilder && python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
# 1. Make the boilerplate template default to the YEAR placeholder.
p = Path('pkg/plugins/golang/v4/scaffolds/internal/templates/hack/boilerplate.go')
s = p.read_text()
s = s.replace('\n\t"path/filepath"\n\t"time"\n', '\n\t"path/filepath"\n')
s = s.replace('''\tif f.Year == "" {
\t\tf.Year = fmt.Sprintf("%v", time.Now().Year())
\t}
''', '''\tif f.Year == "" {
\t\tf.Year = "YEAR"
\t}
''')
p.write_text(s)

# 2. Add common YEAR replacement helper for Go scaffolding.
p = Path('pkg/plugins/golang/boilerplate.go')
p.write_text('''/*
Copyright 2026 The Kubernetes Authors.

Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
You may obtain a copy of the License at

    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0

Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
limitations under the License.
*/

package golang

import (
\t"strconv"
\t"strings"
\t"time"
)

const boilerplateYearPlaceholder = "YEAR"

// ReplaceBoilerplateYear replaces YEAR placeholders with the current year.
func ReplaceBoilerplateYear(boilerplate string) string {
\treturn strings.ReplaceAll(boilerplate, boilerplateYearPlaceholder, strconv.Itoa(time.Now().Year()))
}
''')

# 3. Resolve YEAR before injecting boilerplate into v4 init/api/webhook templates.
for rel in ['pkg/plugins/golang/v4/scaffolds/init.go', 'pkg/plugins/golang/v4/scaffolds/api.go', 'pkg/plugins/golang/v4/scaffolds/webhook.go']:
    p = Path(rel)
    s = p.read_text()
    if 'sigs.k8s.io/kubebuilder/v4/pkg/plugins/golang"' not in s:
        marker = '\t"sigs.k8s.io/kubebuilder/v4/pkg/plugins"\n'
        s = s.replace(marker, marker + '\tgoPlugin "sigs.k8s.io/kubebuilder/v4/pkg/plugins/golang"\n')
    s = s.replace('machinery.WithBoilerplate(string(boilerplate))', 'machinery.WithBoilerplate(goPlugin.ReplaceBoilerplateYear(string(boilerplate)))')
    p.write_text(s)

# 4. Resolve YEAR before injecting boilerplate into deploy-image generated files.
p = Path('pkg/plugins/golang/deploy-image/v1alpha1/scaffolds/api.go')
s = p.read_text()
if 'goPlugin "sigs.k8s.io/kubebuilder/v4/pkg/plugins/golang"' not in s:
    marker = '\t"sigs.k8s.io/kubebuilder/v4/pkg/plugins"\n'
    s = s.replace(marker, marker + '\tgoPlugin "sigs.k8s.io/kubebuilder/v4/pkg/plugins/golang"\n')
s = s.replace('machinery.WithBoilerplate(string(boilerplate))', 'machinery.WithBoilerplate(goPlugin.ReplaceBoilerplateYear(string(boilerplate)))')
p.write_text(s)

# 5. Update generated Makefile template with YEAR and controller-gen year option.
p = Path('pkg/plugins/golang/v4/scaffolds/internal/templates/makefile.go')
s = p.read_text()
s = s.replace('''# Image URL to use all building/pushing image targets
IMG ?= {{ .Image }}
''', '''# Image URL to use all building/pushing image targets
IMG ?= {{ .Image }}

# Current year used for copyright headers.
YEAR ?= $(shell date +%Y)
''')
s = s.replace('''\t"$(CONTROLLER_GEN)" object:headerFile={{printf "%q" .BoilerplatePath}} paths="./..."''', '''\t"$(CONTROLLER_GEN)" object:headerFile={{printf "%q" .BoilerplatePath}},year=$(YEAR) paths="./..."''')
p.write_text(s)
PY
gofmt -w pkg/plugins/golang/boilerplate.go pkg/plugins/golang/v4/scaffolds/internal/templates/hack/boilerplate.go pkg/plugins/golang/v4/scaffolds/init.go pkg/plugins/golang/v4/scaffolds/api.go pkg/plugins/golang/v4/scaffolds/webhook.go pkg/plugins/golang/deploy-image/v1alpha1/scaffolds/api.go pkg/plugins/golang/v4/scaffolds/internal/templates/makefile.go

#!/usr/bin/env bash

tmp=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT
cd "$tmp" || exit 1
fail=0
current_year=$(date +%Y)

GOMODCACHE=/tmp/kubebuilder-gomodcache GOSUMDB=off "$kb" init \
  --plugins go/v4 --project-version 3 --domain example.com \
  --repo example.com/year-demo --project-name year-demo \
  --owner "The Kubernetes authors" --fetch-deps=false >/tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro-init.log 2>&1 || {
  cat /tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro-init.log
  exit 1
}

if grep -q 'Copyright YEAR The Kubernetes authors\.' hack/boilerplate.go.txt; then
  echo 'ok: init boilerplate uses YEAR placeholder'
else
  echo 'FAIL: init boilerplate does not use YEAR placeholder'
  sed -n '1,8p' hack/boilerplate.go.txt
  fail=1
fi

if grep -q "Copyright ${current_year} The Kubernetes authors\." cmd/main.go && ! grep -q 'Copyright YEAR' cmd/main.go; then
  echo 'ok: init-generated Go files resolve YEAR placeholder'
else
  echo 'FAIL: init-generated Go files did not resolve YEAR placeholder'
  sed -n '1,8p' cmd/main.go
  fail=1
fi

GOMODCACHE=/tmp/kubebuilder-gomodcache GOSUMDB=off "$kb" create api \
  --group ship --version v1 --kind Frigate --resource --controller --make=false \
  >/tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro-api.log 2>&1 || {
  cat /tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro-api.log
  exit 1
}

if grep -q "Copyright ${current_year} The Kubernetes authors\." api/v1/frigate_types.go && ! grep -q 'Copyright YEAR' api/v1/frigate_types.go; then
  echo 'ok: create api resolved YEAR placeholder in Go header'
else
  echo 'FAIL: create api did not resolve YEAR placeholder in Go header'
  sed -n '1,8p' api/v1/frigate_types.go
  fail=1
fi

GOMODCACHE=/tmp/kubebuilder-gomodcache GOSUMDB=off "$kb" create webhook \
  --group ship --version v1 --kind Frigate --defaulting --make=false \
  >/tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro-webhook.log 2>&1 || {
  cat /tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro-webhook.log
  exit 1
}

if grep -q "Copyright ${current_year} The Kubernetes authors\." internal/webhook/v1/frigate_webhook.go && ! grep -q 'Copyright YEAR' internal/webhook/v1/frigate_webhook.go; then
  echo 'ok: create webhook resolved YEAR placeholder in Go header'
else
  echo 'FAIL: create webhook did not resolve YEAR placeholder in Go header'
  sed -n '1,8p' internal/webhook/v1/frigate_webhook.go
  fail=1
fi

if grep -Fq 'YEAR ?= $(shell date +%Y)' Makefile && \
   grep -Fq 'object:headerFile="hack/boilerplate.go.txt",year=$(YEAR) paths="./..."' Makefile; then
  echo 'ok: Makefile passes year to controller-gen'
else
  echo 'FAIL: Makefile does not pass year to controller-gen as expected'
  grep -nE 'YEAR|controller-gen|headerFile|generate:' Makefile | head -20
  fail=1
fi

ownerless=$(mktemp -d)
cd "$ownerless" || exit 1
GOMODCACHE=/tmp/kubebuilder-gomodcache GOSUMDB=off "$kb" init \
  --plugins go/v4 --project-version 3 --domain example.com \
  --repo example.com/year-demo-ownerless --project-name year-demo-ownerless \
  --fetch-deps=false >/tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro-ownerless.log 2>&1 || {
  cat /tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro-ownerless.log
  exit 1
}
if grep -q 'Copyright YEAR\.' hack/boilerplate.go.txt && \
   grep -q "Copyright ${current_year}\." cmd/main.go && \
   ! grep -q 'Copyright YEAR' cmd/main.go; then
  echo 'ok: ownerless boilerplate keeps YEAR and generated files resolve it'
else
  echo 'FAIL: ownerless boilerplate YEAR behavior is incorrect'
  sed -n '1,8p' hack/boilerplate.go.txt
  sed -n '1,8p' cmd/main.go
  fail=1
fi

exit "$fail"
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro.sh
/tmp/kubebuilder-year-repro.sh; echo script_status=$?

limitations under the License.

package golang

import (
        "strconv"
        "strings"
        "time"
)

const boilerplateYearPlaceholder = "YEAR"

// ReplaceBoilerplateYear replaces YEAR placeholders with the current year.
func ReplaceBoilerplateYear(boilerplate string) string {
        return strings.ReplaceAll(boilerplate, boilerplateYearPlaceholder, strconv.Itoa(time.Now().Year()))
}

content.text:
Implemented the `YEAR` placeholder support in non-test source files.

Summary of changes:
- `hack/boilerplate.go.txt` scaffolding now defaults to `Copyright YEAR ...` instead of resolving the year during `kubebuilder init`.
- Added `golang.ReplaceBoilerplateYear(...)` to resolve `YEAR` to the current year when Kubebuilder injects boilerplate into generated Go files.
- Applied the placeholder replacement when reading boilerplate for:
  - `kubebuilder init`
  - `kubebuilder create api`
  - `kubebuilder create webhook`
  - deploy-image API scaffolding
- Updated generated `Makefile` template to include:
  ```makefile
  YEAR ?= $(shell date +%Y)
  ```
  and to call:
  ```makefile
  "$(CONTROLLER_GEN)" object:headerFile="hack/boilerplate.go.txt",year=$(YEAR) paths="./..."
  ```

Verification performed:
- Baseline before changes: `make test-unit` passed.
- Temporary reproduction script confirmed the original failures, then passed after the fix.
- Edge cases verified:
  - `init` keeps `YEAR` in `hack/boilerplate.go.txt`
  - `init`-generated Go files resolve `YEAR`
  - `create api` resolves `YEAR`
  - `create webhook` resolves `YEAR`
  - ownerless boilerplate also keeps `YEAR` while generated files resolve it
  - generated `Makefile` includes `YEAR` and passes `year=$(YEAR)`
- Targeted tests:
  ```bash
  go test ./pkg/plugins/golang/...
  ```
  passed.
- Full unit suite:
  ```bash
  make test-unit
  ```
  passed.
- `git diff --check` passed.

Note: I did not modify test files or generated `testdata`. The repository already had an untracked `reports/` directory, which I left untouched.

Please continue working on the task on whatever approach you think is suitable.
When you think you have solved the question, please use the finish tool and include your final answer in the message parameter of the finish tool.
IMPORTANT: YOU SHOULD NEVER ASK FOR HUMAN HELP.


  - `kubebuilder create api` resolves `YEAR` in generated Go headers.
  - `kubebuilder create webhook` resolves `YEAR` in generated Go headers.
  - Ownerless boilerplate keeps `YEAR` in the boilerplate file and resolves it in generated Go files.

  ```bash
  make test-unit
  ```
